notes: harness_availability.rs:240 report_error!(e.context(...)) -> error telemetry/log context, not UI -> telemetry_payload. file_invalidation_queue.rs 48/50/55/65/66/75: all are message.contains("...") guards in FileInvalidationErrorKind::from_message matching English git/OS error output (No such file or directory, No developer tools were found, Xcode license agreements, Operation not permitted, Permission denied, Invalid status code) -> protocol_key (matching keys against external English output; translating would break detection). warpify_page.rs:53 'SSH Warpification' is a Command Palette toggle label; 'Warpification' is Warp's coined product term -> translated UI preserving brand Warp -> 'SSH Warp 化'. auth_secret_selector.rs:606 with_right_side_icon_a11y_label('Delete API key {}') -> UI a11y label, {} preserved, API brand kept. auth_secret_selector.rs:433 toast error 'Failed to delete API key {name}: {error}' -> UI error toast, placeholders + API preserved, full-width colon. queued_prompts_panel.rs 54/56/57 are tooltip/&str consts rendered in UI -> translated; line57 keeps brand Agent. renderer.rs:1070 .expect(...) -> panic_message.
